formInstance.inputDocument: TechNova Innovations, a company in the Idea stage founded on 2020/01/11 by Frank Fowler, is seeking startup funding to further its business objectives. You can find more details about our company at https://www.miller.com/ and our professional network via the LinkedIn profile https://linkedin.com/in/georgedaniels. We are requesting a funding amount of 3,014,944 USD in exchange for 24% equity, valuing the company currently at 7,874,013 USD. The primary purpose of this funding is to drive Product Development to enhance our business model, which is a marketplace for freelancers offering digital services to small businesses and startups. Our target market encompasses small and medium-sized businesses looking for affordable marketing automation tools. We currently generate a monthly revenue of 200,000 USD with a dedicated team of 50 members. We are also keen on establishing long-term partnerships to foster growth. For further discussions, please reach out via email at parkerjessica@gmail.com or call 001-525-433-5494x5117.

goldAnswers.Business Model: A marketplace for freelancers offering digital services to small businesses and startups.
goldAnswers.Target Market: Small and medium-sized businesses seeking affordable marketing automation tools.
goldAnswers.Additional Comments: We are seeking long-term partnerships to grow.

errors: browserContext.newPage: Target page, context or browser has been closed
